narrative:
Cols 79-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 980 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.7 percentage points.
